name: My Day
description: Your personal daily cockpit inside Microsoft 365 Copilot — see your next meeting, tasks due, latest news and important mail at a glance, then expand to a full daily dashboard with a Plan my day focus assistant.

conversation_starters.title: Show my day
conversation_starters.text: What does my day look like?

conversation_starters.title: Plan my day
conversation_starters.text: Help me plan my day and tell me what to focus on first.
